## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance trending upward; 6 articles published last week, 7 planned for this week](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Team aligning on success metrics, benchmarking, and balancing SEO with technical depth](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Agreed to add "Last Updated" dates to refreshed content without changing publish dates](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Prophecy to inform GrowthX of new product features/topics via Slack for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Metrics

  - [Clicks holding steady at new level, impressions rising](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Last week saw large increase in views and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Over 50% of sessions are "engaged" (\>1 min or multiple page views)](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Team discussing how to define success beyond traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Exploring relevance via keyword rankings and conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Content Strategy and Priorities

  - [Pivoting to include more broad, 101-level content while maintaining technical depth](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Balancing SEO requirements with credibility for technical readers](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Content refresh approach considers performance data, search intent, and cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Team to update content priorities in shared document](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Product Updates and Content Alignment

  - [Prophecy shifting focus to self-service and exploring AI agents for data integration](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Agreed to share new features/topics via Slack for GrowthX to incorporate into content plan](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### Content Refresh and Dating

  - [Will add "Last Updated" line to refreshed articles without changing publish dates](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Maintains blog post order while improving user experience and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to update content priority numbers in shared document](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Implement "Last Updated" line in refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [GrowthX to create regular cadence for sharing performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Prophecy to share new product features/topics via Slack for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide brief summary of alignments from this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sGcV-U-BqdyJDBG-Me77i8y3AC3jL6Pi?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
